description: An employee wants to increase their 401(k) contribution percentage.

nodes.task_description: Direct the employee to the 401(k) provider's website to make the change.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent explains that contribution changes must be made directly with the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the change will be reflected in the next 1-2 pay cycles after the provider notifies the company's payroll system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sets correct expectations about the timing of the change.
